description: Reference schema for the circuit neuronal manipulation by section list UI element.
title: Ion channel variable manipulations by section type
description_ui: Circuit variant: ion channel RANGE variable modification by section list, with neuron set selection.

neuron_set_field.description: The neuron_set field value is passed to the /neuronal-manipulation-properties endpoint to determine available variables.

ion_channel_id.description: Ion channel entity ID, when applicable.

variable_name.description: RANGE variable selected by the user.

section_list_modifications.description: Mapping of section list to replacement value.
